mapper.select:
select tr.id, tr.user_id, tr.account_id, tr.category_id, tr.amount, tr.transaction_type, tr.transaction_time, tr.remark, tr.created_at,
ui.name as userName, ui.images as userImages,
ac.account_name as accountName, ac.account_type as accountType,
ca.sub_name as categoryName
from transactions tr left join user_info ui on (ui.id = tr.user_id) left join accounts ac on (ac.id = tr.account_id) left join categories ca on (ca.id = tr.category_id) where 1 = 1
AND ui.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryFrom.userName},'%')
AND tr.transaction_type = #{queryFrom.transactionType}
order by tr.id desc
